upgrades_v4_3.UPGRADE_1: Sector filter: electricity-generation + source_id not null
upgrades_v4_3.UPGRADE_3: HDD = max(0, 18-temp): captures winter gas heating load
upgrades_v4_3.UPGRADE_4: sMAPE reported alongside MAPE: symmetric error metric
upgrades_v4_3.UPGRADE_5: ADF stationarity test + XGBoost feature importance per location
upgrades_v4_3.FIX_A: Raw temp excluded from all models (collinear with CDD, r~0.96)
upgrades_v4_3.FIX_D: Future weather + activity_mwh = monthly climatology (no oracle)

v2_1_fixes.FIX_1: Winner logic: NaN-safe — requires finite MAPE AND R2>0 for both models
v2_1_fixes.FIX_2: Aggregate: unmodelled locations (status=unmodelled) excluded from totals
v2_1_fixes.FIX_3: XGB CV: folds with <15 usable training rows skipped (was silent NaN)
v2_1_fixes.FIX_4: Column: capacity_factor auto-renamed to activity_mwh when mean>5

aggregate_forecast.note: Aggregate covers 7 modelled locations. 1 location(s) excluded: ['Reshma power station']
